creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Olivier Certner from comment #9)
Sorry for the delay and it test good to me. Just one minor nitpick: what do you think if we rename THIS_LISPDIR to SLY_LISPDIR for a more specified variable name?

Also I think for pkg-plist we can just use %%EMACS_VERSION_SITE_LISPDIR%%/sly (${PREFIX} included}.
